chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. S – 15 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For direction / Disposed of matter For hearing of CMA No.2495/2019 (Contempt) (Notices issued) 27.05.2019 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional Prosecutor General for the State..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Shahnawaz Waseer, advocate has filed vakalatnama on behalf of the petitioner; it is taken on record. The applicant by way of instant application has sought for prosecution of the respondents for their failure to obey the order dated 11.03.2019 passed by this Court, whereby they were directed to provide protection to the applicant and his family members in accordance with law. On being asked, in what manner the respondents have failed to provide protection to the applicant and his family members? It is stated by the learned counsel for the applicant that no protection was provided to the applicant and his family members, which provided chance to his rivals to attack upon him. On being asked further whether such attack is reported to police? Reply which was furnished by learned counsel by the applicant was in negative. The allegation of attack upon the applicant is denied by SHO P.S Khanpur Mahar by way of filing his reply. In that situation, it could be concluded safely that no case for prosecution of respondents for their failure to have obeyed the order of this Court is made out. Consequently, the instant application is dismissed. J U D G E Abdul Basit
